news.t: MSIM Adds Latest Strategy, Parametric Equity Plus, to $3.3 Billion ETF Platform

holdings.infoBox: PEPS is an equity ETF with a total of 194 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.99%, Apple at 6.58%, Microsoft at 4.36%, Amazon.com at 3.53%, and Alphabet at 3.27%.

overview.description: The Parametric Equity Plus ETF (PEPS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively investing in a US large-cap equity portfolio while generating incremental total return via beta-neutral call options overwriting. PEPS was launched on Nov 7, 2024 and is issued by Parametric.

data.title: MSIM Adds Latest Strategy, Parametric Equity Plus, to $3.3 Billion ETF Platform
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Morgan Stanley Investment Management (“MSIM”) today announced the launch of its latest ETF, Parametric Equity Plus ETF (Ticker: “PEPS”), a US large-cap equity strategy. Sinc...
